creator: zanoxdod@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

Same problem :(

I just upgraded from FreeNAS 11.3 to TrueNAS 12.0 STABLE.

- I have a one SSD with the SO. And one RAIDZ with 3 discs of 12TB.
- With FreeNAS I have never had problems, the all discs are new (2 months of lifetime). 
- As soon as I update to TrueNAS, I get the same errors...


...
ATA_IDENTIFY. ACB: ec 00 00 00 00 40 00 00 00 00 00 00
CAM status: command timeout
Retrying command, 0 more tries remaind
Timeout on slot 20 port 0
...

Some help? 
Regards
